name: Docker Hub
description: Docker Hub is the world's largest container image registry. Search, pull, and manage container images, repositories, and organizations for containerized application deployment.

capabilities.name: search_images
capabilities.description: Search Docker Hub for container images by name, description, or keyword.

capabilities.name: list_repositories
capabilities.description: List repositories for a user or organization namespace.

capabilities.name: get_tags
capabilities.description: List available tags and versions for a specific repository.

capabilities.name: get_repository_details
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a repository including description and pull count.

capabilities.name: create_repository
capabilities.description: Create a new repository in a user or organization namespace.

capabilities.name: delete_tag
capabilities.description: Delete a specific tag from a repository.
